overview: BioLearn Academy is an interactive educational biology website covering core biology (Biomolecules, Cells, DNA, RNA, Proteins) and biotechnology topics (CRISPR, PCR, Cloning, Gel Electrophoresis, and more). Features realistic animated structures, detailed explanations, and quizzes with instant feedback.
features: Interactive 3D cell, DNA, RNA, and protein animations with realistic images
Natural subtle animations — gentle floating, slow rotation, soft pulsing
8 biotechnology topic sections (CRISPR, PCR, Cloning, Gel Electrophoresis, and more)
8-10 question quizzes per topic with instant feedback and score tracking
Permanent labeled overlays on all biological structures
Full WCAG accessibility — keyboard navigation, ARIA, screen reader support
Navy/dark-blue themed design with topic-specific color coding
One-click sidebar navigation to any topic
